The '''Fairfolk''' were a very small race that resembled ethereal, floating [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]]. They were strong in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and a number of them working for [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] attempted to sway an oblivious [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] by setting up a psychic link between Skywalker and Vader, who was stationed on board the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Conqueror (Imperial-class)|''Conqueror'']]. The arrival of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] freed Luke from the Fairfolk's trance.<ref name="3-D">[[Star Wars 3-D 3|''Star Wars 3-D'' 3]]</ref>
